overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a dirt trail through open prairie grasslands with snow-capped mountains in the distance. The character encounters a black bear beside the path and passes a weathered wooden signpost while telegraph poles line the route.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie trail with mountain vistas

events.description: character takes the right fork at the trail split

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail through open grassland with snow-capped mountains ahead

entered.detail: winding dirt path cutting through tall grass
wooden utility poles with crossbars and wires lining the trail
distant mountain range with snow visible on the peaks
rolling hills covered in tall green grass
rolling hills covered in tall green grass

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a winding dirt trail through open prairie grasslands. Telegraph poles line the left side of the path while snow-capped mountains rise in the distant background under a clear blue sky. The path splits early on and the character takes the right fork.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie trail with mountain vistas

events.description: large black bear becomes visible standing on the right side of the trail ahead
character passes the stationary bear, which remains on the right side

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a black bear standing beside the trail

notable_agents.action: black bear standing beside the trail, watching the character approach and pass

segments.scene_description: As the character continues along the trail, a large black bear becomes visible standing in the grass on the right side of the path. The character walks past the stationary bear, which watches from the roadside before being left behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie trail approaching wooded area

events.description: weathered wooden signpost becomes visible on the left side of the trail

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail past the bear and approaching a wooden signpost

entered.detail: weathered wooden post with multiple directional arrow signs

segments.scene_description: The trail continues through the grassland as the character moves away from the bear. A weathered wooden signpost appears on the left side of the path, and the telegraph poles draw closer as the landscape gradually transitions toward a more wooded area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a winding dirt trail that transitions from open prairie grasslands toward a more wooded landscape. It begins with the character navigating a fork in the path, moving rightward through wide plains lined with telegraph poles under a clear blue sky with distant snow-capped mountains. As the journey continues, the camera passes a large black bear standing stationary in the grass on the right side of the trail. The scene then shifts away from the animal and toward a weathered wooden signpost on the left, while the surrounding terrain gradually closes in with denser vegetation. Finally, the camera tracks forward as the telegraph poles draw closer and the open grasslands give way to the edge of a wooded area.
